name: Incomplete Filtering of Special Elements
description: The product receives data from an upstream component but does not completely filter special elements before sending it to a downstream component. For example, a regex without a global modifier may only remove the first occurrence of a dangerous pattern like '../', leaving subsequent instances intact.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides data containing special elements that flows through a CONTROL node performing partial filtering (non-global regex, single-pass removal) to an EGRESS or TRANSFORM node, where unfiltered instances of the special element remain.
